name: Tasty Beast Burger — Rynek Dębnicki
description: Long-running Kraków burger favourite (since ~2019) specializing in classic Black Angus stacks and a separate line of thin-patty smash burgers. Strong vegan/vegetarian section (oyster mushroom, halloumi, Beyond Meat), American-leaning vibe, casual seating.
